schema.title: Response List Images Properties  Property Id  Images Get
Response Reorder Images Properties  Property Id  Images Reorder Put

get.description: Public — returns owner-set weekday price overrides.

schema.title: Response List Weekday Prices Properties  Property Id  Pricing Weekdays Get

put.description:
Replaces all weekday price rules for the property atomically.

Sending an empty list clears all weekday overrides.
Each weekday (0–6) must appear at most once.

schema.title: Response Upsert Weekday Prices Properties  Property Id  Pricing Weekdays Put

get.description:
Public — returns holiday/special-date price overrides.

Optional ``from_date`` / ``to_date`` filter returns overrides that
overlap the given window.

schema.title: Response List Overrides Properties  Property Id  Pricing Overrides Get

get.description:
Public — returns per-night price breakdown for a date range.

``start_date`` is the check-in date; ``end_date`` is the checkout date
(excluded from the nightly results).  ``end_date`` must be after ``start_date``.

Response includes ``currency``, ``total``, and a ``nights`` list with the
resolved price and source (``base`` | ``weekday`` | ``date_override``) per night.

PropertyCreate.description:
Payload for POST /properties.
owner_id is injected from the authenticated user.
Must include at least one translation.

PropertyListItem.title: PropertyListItem
PropertyListItem.description:
Lightweight projection for GET /properties (list / search).
Returns the name in the requested locale (resolved by the CRUD layer).

PropertyResponse.description: Full property representation returned from any read endpoint.
